Topic

(1)

Priority

(2)

Select your top 2-3 priorities (based on the highest business impact or urgency)

Completion date: Jan 5, 2025

Expected Outcomes for the workshop

(3)

Input the expected outcomes (for the top 2-3 selected topics only)

Completion date: Jan 5, 2025

Content requirements

(4)

Answer the discovery questions (so that we can dive into the content requirements)

Completion date: Jan 9, 2025

Integrate & Extend Platform Capabilities

Data Activation (Custom Actions, Data Write-back)

 

  • Explore custom actions to enable users to take direct action on data from within the platform (e.g., updating a CRM record, triggering a workflow)

  • Discuss enabling data write-back capabilities to allow business users to contribute to the data loop

  • What are the challenges or areas where you need advice? For example, are there technical solutions, security concerns, or other issues we should address?

  • What are some common examples of custom actions?

Product Embedding

& Data Monetization

 

  • Understand how embedding works technically

  • Explore the opportunity to transform from a cost center into a direct driver of business growth, and create a new revenue stream

  • What are the challenges or areas where you need advice? For example, are there technical solutions, security concerns, or other issues we should address?

  • What insights do you need to embed, and what data products would be most valuable to build?

Enhance System Activity

Change management for System Activity

 

  • Handle upstream change

  • Integrate it into our current model design promptly

  • What are the expected update frequencies and SLA?

  • What's the process for approving the integration?

Well-Designed Schema Model

  • Re-structure the data model, e.g. centralize content data (views, dashboard, report)

  • Explore a strategy for modeling when using Project Alpha

 

  • Centralize data insights, e.g. centralize content data (views, dashboard, report)

  • Centralized Source of Truth: Strategize on consolidating key business data into our data warehouse before connecting to the platform, reinforcing its role as a single source of truth.

Do you have any specific concerns or areas you'd like to focus on? What are your expectations for this session?

Transformation Concepts & Deployment

 

  • Explore good case practices and apply them to our data workflow

  • Deploy core logic on Cloud Provider

Do you have any specific concerns or areas you'd like to focus on? What are your expectations for this session?

System Activity Insights:

  • Scheduled failures

  • Alerts

  • Field Usage

  • Slow queries, heavy users, and potential bottlenecks.

 

  • Foster content governance: documentation coverage, naming conventions, unused or outdated content, and most used custom fields

  • Monitor schedules and alerts

  • What use cases should we explore together?

  • What are the key challenges where you need our advice?
